hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r filepath; if [[ "$filepath" == *.lua && "$filepath" == "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/* ]]; then relpath="${filepath#$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/}"; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; if [[ "$relpath" != */* ]]; then python3 tools/map_extract.py "$relpath" map/ 2>/dev/null; elif [[ "$relpath" == tests/specs/*.lua ]]; then python3 tools/map_extract.py "$relpath" map/specs/ 2>/dev/null; elif [[ "$relpath" == tests/*.lua ]]; then python3 tools/map_extract.py "$relpath" map/ 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; true; }
